# services.lighthouse

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.lighthouse`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon` | `submodule` | Beacon node |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.address` | `string` | Listen address of Beacon node. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.dataDir` | `string` | Directory where data will be stored. Each chain will be stored under it's own specific subdirectory. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.disableDepositContractSync` | `boolean` | Explicitly disables syncing of deposit logs from the execution node. This overrides any previous option that depends on it. Useful if you intend to run a non-validating beacon node. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Lightouse Beacon node. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.execution.address` | `string` | Listen address for the execution layer. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.execution.jwtPath` | `string` | Path for the jwt secret required to connect to the execution layer. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.execution.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number the Beacon node will be listening on for the execution layer. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.extraArgs` | `string` | Additional arguments passed to the lighthouse beacon command. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.http.address` | `string` | Listen address of Beacon node RPC service. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.http.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Beacon node http api. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.http.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number of Beacon node RPC service. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.metrics.address` | `string` | Listen address of Beacon node metrics service. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.metrics.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Beacon node prometheus metrics. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.metrics.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number of Beacon node metrics service. |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open the port in the firewall |
| `services.lighthouse.beacon.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number the Beacon node will be listening on. |
| `services.lighthouse.extraArgs` | `string` | Additional arguments passed to every lighthouse command. |
| `services.lighthouse.network` | `one of "mainnet", "gnosis", "chiado", "sepolia", "holesky"` | The network to connect to. Mainnet is the default ethereum network. |
| `services.lighthouse.package` | `package` | The lighthouse package to use. |
| `services.lighthouse.validator` | `submodule` | Validator node |
| `services.lighthouse.validator.beaconNodes` | `list of string` | Beacon nodes to connect to. |
| `services.lighthouse.validator.dataDir` | `string` | Directory where data will be stored. Each chain will be stored under it's own specific subdirectory. |
| `services.lighthouse.validator.enable` | `boolean` | Enable Lightouse Validator node. |
| `services.lighthouse.validator.extraArgs` | `string` | Additional arguments passed to the lighthouse validator command. |
| `services.lighthouse.validator.metrics.address` | `string` | Listen address of Validator node metrics service. |
| `services.lighthouse.validator.metrics.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Validator node prometheus metrics. |
| `services.lighthouse.validator.metrics.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number of Validator node metrics service. |
